items.q: The character Jessica Hyde appears in Utopia (UK).
items.explanation: Jessica Hyde is a key character in Utopia (UK).

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Dale Cooper.
items.explanation: Dale Cooper is strongly linked to Twin Peaks.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Martin Rauch.
items.explanation: Martin Rauch is strongly linked to Deutschland 83.

items.q: The character Frank Pembleton appears in Star Trek: Voyager.
items.explanation: Frank Pembleton appears in Homicide: Life on the Street, not Star Trek: Voyager.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Basil Fawlty.
items.explanation: Basil Fawlty is strongly linked to Fawlty Towers.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Fall?
items.explanation: Stella Gibson is one of the defining characters in The Fall.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Jean-Luc Picard.
items.explanation: Jean-Luc Picard is strongly linked to Star Trek: The Next Generation.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Shield?
items.explanation: Vic Mackey is one of the defining characters in The Shield.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Orphan Black?
items.explanation: Sarah Manning is one of the defining characters in Orphan Black.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Eve Polastri?
items.explanation: Eve Polastri is associated with Killing Eve.
